name: Crunchy Crab Nuggets
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut bread into 1-inch slices; remove crusts.
2. Cut trimmed slices into 1-1/2 inch cubes.
3. Hollow out each cube with a sharp knife, leaving a shell about 1/8-inch thick.
4. Brush sides and tops of the nuggets with melted butter.
5. Place nuggets on a cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 400 degrees for 10 minutes or until nuggets are lightly browned and crisp.
7. Remove from oven and cool.
8. Remove all cartilage from crabmeat.
9. In a bowl, blend cheese and egg.
10. Add Worcestershire sauce, lemon and pepper seasoning, mustard, and garlic powder; gently mix in crab meat.
11. Fill nuggets with crab meat mixture.
12. Sprinkle paprika over the tops of the nuggets.
13. Place on a cookie sheet and bake at 400 degrees for 5-10 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
